creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
See
https://github.com/moench-tegeder/freebsd-chromium/blob/chromium_47_0_2526_80/www/chromium/files/patch-media__audio__audio_manager.h
https://github.com/moench-tegeder/freebsd-chromium/blob/chromium_47_0_2526_80/www/chromium/files/patch-media__audio__audio_manager.c

I haven't had time to port the FreeBSD 9 fixes yet, or even test-build on FreeBSD 9. OTOH that tree is what I'm currently using for building chrome on 10.2-amd64.
